title: User Authentication System
description:
### Acceptance Criteria
- JWT token generation and validation
- Password hashing with bcrypt
- Login/logout endpoints

### Technical Notes
Use Flask-JWT-Extended for token management.

title: Dashboard Analytics Widget
description:
### Acceptance Criteria
- Display ticket count per status
- Show velocity chart for last 3 sprints
- Responsive layout for mobile

title: Email Notification Service
description:
### Acceptance Criteria
- Send notification on ticket status change
- Configurable email templates
- Rate limiting to prevent spam

title: Export Backlog to CSV
description:
### Acceptance Criteria
- Export all tickets with metadata
- Filter by status before export
- Include story points and priority

title: Fix drag-drop bug on mobile
description:
### Bug Report
- Drag and drop doesn't work on touch devices
- Need to add touch sensor to @dnd-kit config
- Test on iOS Safari and Chrome Android
